# Load the file and print repr for analysis
with open('/mnt/data/file-U47Yfir1544nepaYPQGxkg-text_to_analyse.txt','r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    text = f.read()
print(text)

# Count occurrences of that specific pattern
pattern = 'مَنْ أَخَذَ بِالْقُرْآنِ وَأَخَذَ بِالنَفْسِ فَكَذَلِكَ الَّذِي أَخَذَ بِالْنَفْسِ'
text.count(pattern)

import re
# find all occurrences of quotes content
quotes = re.findall(r'\"(.*?)\"', text)
len(quotes), quotes[:10]

import re
text = open('/mnt/data/file-U47Yfir1544nepaYPQGxkg-text_to_analyse.txt','r', encoding='utf-8').read()

citations = []

# Ayat
ayats = re.findall(r'\{(.*?)\}', text, flags=re.S)
for ayat_text in ayats:
    # trimmed ayat: strip whitespace and punctuation like .,؟!،؛:… quotes, brackets, tatweel, ellipsis
    trimmed = ayat_text.strip(" \n\t\r\u200f\u200e\u202a\u202b\u202c\u202d\u202e\ufeff" + ".,؟!،؛:…ـ\"'[](){}<>")
    # find with braces
    pattern = r'\{' + re.escape(ayat_text) + r'\}'
    for m in re.finditer(pattern, text):
        start = m.start() + 1  # skip '{'
        end = m.end() - 1      # before '}'
        # Now we need adjust for trimming
        # If trimmed differs from ayat_text, find trimmed inside
        if trimmed != ayat_text:
            # find trimmed in that substring
            sub = text[start:end]
            idx = sub.find(trimmed)
            if idx != -1:
                start = start + idx
                end = start + len(trimmed)
            else:
                print("Trimmed not found in ayat", trimmed)
        # assert
        assert text[start:end] == trimmed, (text[start:end], trimmed)
        citations.append({"span_start": start, "span_end": end, "span_text": trimmed, "citation_type": "Aya"})
        
# Hadith
# find all quote matches
for m in re.finditer(r'"(.*?)"', text, flags=re.S):
    group = m.group(1)
    # check context: preceding within 64 chars for حديث cues
    # But all are hadith.
    # trim group
    trimmed = group.strip(" \n\t\r\u200f\u200e\u202a\u202b\u202c\u202d\u202e\ufeff" + ".,؟!،؛:…ـ\"'[](){}<>")
    start = m.start(1)
    end = start + len(trimmed)
    # find trimmed in group
    # But group may have trailing punctuation removed
    # Compute sub = text[start:m.end(1)] and find trimmed at beginning
    sub = text[start:m.end(1)]
    idx = sub.find(trimmed)
    if idx != 0:
        # maybe need to shift
        start = start + idx
    end = start + len(trimmed)
    # assert
    assert text[start:end] == trimmed, (text[start:end], trimmed, repr(sub))
    citations.append({"span_start": start, "span_end": end, "span_text": trimmed, "citation_type": "Hadeeth"})

# sort citations by start
citations_sorted = sorted(citations, key=lambda x: x['span_start'])
len(citations_sorted), citations_sorted

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":222,"span_end":421,"span_text":"وَكَذَلِكَ أَوْحَيْنَا إِلَيْكَ رُوحًا مِنْ أَمْرِنَا مَا كُنتَ تَدْرِي مَا الْكِتَابُ وَلَا الْإِيمَانُ وَلَكِنْ جَعَلْنَاهُ تَفْمِيَةً عَلَى قَلْبِكَ وَمُصَدِّقًا لِذِكْرِنَا وَهُدًى لِلْمُتَّقِينَ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":454,"span_end":593,"span_text":"وَإِنْ يَمُدُّوكَ عَلَى الْقَتْلِ ثَمَّ قَدْ يَمُدُّ اللَّهُ عِنْدَهُ مِنْ قَبْلُ وَلَيُدْخِلَنَّ الَّذِينَ يَتَّقُونَ مِنْ عَذَابٍ غَلِيٍّ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":628,"span_end":685,"span_text":"وَإِنَّ هَذَا قَوْلُنَا لَمُبَيِّنٌ لِأُولِي الْأَلْبَابِ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":735,"span_end":881,"span_text":"إِنَّما الأَعْمَالُ بِالنِيَّةِ، وَإِنَّمَا لِلسَّائِلِ نِعْمَةٌ أَوْ عَذَابٌ يَكُونُ عَلَيْهِ أَوْ يُصَلِّي لَهُ أَوْ يُصَدِّقَهُ أَوْ يُزَكِّيهِ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":931,"span_end":984,"span_text":"مَنْ أَخَذَ بِالْقُرْآنِ وَأَخَذَ بِالنَفْسِ فَهَلَكَ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1034,"span_end":1135,"span_text":"مَنْ أَخَذَ بِالْقُرْآنِ وَأَخَذَ بِالنَفْسِ فَذَلِكَ الَّذِي أَخَذَ بِالنَفْسِ وَأَخَذَ بِالْقُرْآنِ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1188,"span_end":1291,"span_text":"مَنْ أَخَذَ بِالْقُرْآنِ وَأَخَذَ بِالنَفْسِ فَكَذَلِكَ الَّذِي أَخَذَ بِالنَفْسِ وَأَخَذَ بِالْقُرْآنِ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1341,"span_end":1444,"span_text":"مَنْ أَخَذَ بِالْقُرْآنِ وَأَخَذَ بِالنَفْسِ فَكَذَلِكَ الَّذِي أَخَذَ بِالْنَفْسِ وَأَخَذَ بِالْقُرْآنِ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1497,"span_end":1600,"span_text":"مَنْ أَخَذَ بِالْقُرْآنِ وَأَخَذَ بِالنَفْسِ فَكَذَلِكَ الَّذِي أَخَذَ بِالْنَفْسِ وَأَخَذَ بِالْقُرْآنِ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1650,"span_end":1753,"span_text":"مَنْ أَخَذَ بِالْقُرْآنِ وَأَخَذَ بِالنَفْسِ فَكَذَلِكَ الَّذِي أَخَذَ بِالْنَفْسِ وَأَخَذَ بِالْقُرْآنِ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"}]}
